title.en: The Peacock Realm Lord stopped talking.

content.en:
The Peacock Realm Lord is very aware of the strength of the Peng Bird Realm Lord, which is far from comparable to him, second only to the existence of the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

The Pengque Realm Lord said lightly: "Ye Tianjing Master has cultivated the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body and has cultivated to perfection, even I have not cultivated the Supreme Dimensional Domain Body, but he has done it, I even suspect that he was cultivated by one of the other eight forces." "

"What is the Supreme Dimensional Domain?" the Peacock Realm Lord wondered.

The Pengque Realm Lord introduced: "As long as you comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions at the seventh realm, and then break through to the eighth realm, you can practice to the supreme dimensional domain. "

"What, comprehending the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions at the seventh realm, how can this be done?" the Peacock Realm Lord was shocked.

"But the Ye Tian Realm Lord did it, didn't he?" said the Peng Que Realm Lord.

The Peacock Realm Lord stopped talking.

"You don't have any more conflicts with the Ye Tian Realm Lord, this matter is over. "

The phantom of the Pengque Realm Lord vanished.

And the Peacock Realm Lord returned to the Peacock Xuan Kingdom soon after, and then announced that ~ the retreat would not come out.

......

After helping the Ice Leaf Realm Lord, Ye Tian had nothing to do with the Ice Leaf Realm Lord.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian contacted the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to see him again—he had reached the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

Compared to the past, the aura of the Purple Yun Realm Lord has not increased much, after all, it is really too difficult to improve the strength of the ninth realm.

In addition, the Purple Yun Realm Lord was afraid of the Lord of the Hidden Realm, but he didn't dare to appear, and he didn't have too many resources, so his strength naturally improved very slowly.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, have you broken through to the ninth realm?"

Purple Rhyme Realm Lord.

She originally wanted to help Ye Tian, but Ye Tian himself broke through to the ninth realm, and it seemed that the aura was terrifying.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, we are working together to deal with the Ten Pyloric Sects, and now I can help you deal with the Cover Shadow Realm Lord. However, I want to return to the Pearl of the Ruins. Ye Tian said.

"Can you destroy the Ten Pylorics?"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian said.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord was a little unconvinced, after all, the strength of the Cover Shadow Realm Lord was too strong!

However, when Ye Tian showed his strength, the Purple Yun Realm Lord no longer doubted it.

And she also agreed to hand over the Pearl of Returning Ruins to Ye Tian, after all, she couldn't protect the Pearl of Returning Ruins.

"I have to find a reason to invade the Ten Pyloric Sects, and I will directly attack the Ten Pyloric Sects in the name of avenging the Tianyun Sect. "

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord agreed.

Soon.

Ye Tian's three replica bodies arrived, and a total of four replica bodies made a move, which also ensured that the Lord of the Hidden Realm would not be able to run.

And seeing Ye Tian's four replica bodies, the Purple Yun Realm Lord was very excited, feeling that this time she would definitely be able to destroy the Ten Pyloric Sects, and she would be able to rebuild the Tianyun Sect.

......

Ten Pylorus, headquarters.

this day.

Ye Tian came here with the Purple Yun Realm Lord, and immediately blocked the surroundings.

Whoa!!!!

The ninth and eighth realms of the Ten Pyloric Gates explored one after another, and when they found the Purple Yun Realm Lord, they were immediately furious.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, you still dare to come to our Ten Pyloric Gate Headquarters and look for death!"

The Ninth Realm of One Venerable made a move and attacked and killed the Lord of the Purple Yun Realm.

Then.

Ye Tian made a move.

Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting unfolded, incorporating these ninth realms, those eighth realms, and countless weak extra-dimensional realms one after another.

The bodies of many extra-dimensional realms were annihilated one after another, and even the eighth realm could not bear this supreme mastery of the eight realms, and they were wiped out one after another.

Those Ninth Realms panicked and tried to resist, but their strength was too weak.

"Stop!"

The Lord of the Cover Realm has made a move.

However, he bombarded Ye Tian's Zhou Tian multi-dimensional painting with all his strength, and it was not torn apart, but it was suppressed by the power of three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars.

Thundered!!!!

The other copied bodies made a move, and in an instant, all the living beings in the Ten Heteroscope Headquarters were wiped out except for the Lord of the Hidden Realm.

Seeing this scene, the Lord of the Covered Realm was extremely angry, and he burned his origin and wanted to break through the blockade.

However.

Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than him, and he couldn't escape at all.

Immediately after, Ye Tian once again unleashed the Seven Star Sword Blade, and one blow pierced through the Lord of the Covered Shadow Realm.

In a short period of time, the Lord of the Covered Netherworld had been severely injured, and his aura had become extremely weak.

Immediately, Ye Tian let the Purple Yun Realm Lord make a move.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord immediately struck, and her attack was naturally difficult to hurt the Cover Ghost Realm Lord, but now that the Cover Shadow Realm Lord was hit hard, she was powerless to resist the Purple Yun Realm Lord's attack.

Soon, the Lord of the Covered Realm was killed.

Afterwards.

Several of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies attacked and killed one of the branches of the Ten Pyloric Sect again, destroying all of them, maybe there must be fish that slipped through the net.

However, these fish that slipped through the net will definitely not dare to appear again, they will hide one by one, or change their identities, and it is impossible to avenge the ten pyloric gates that have been destroyed, and they are not qualified to take revenge.

After the fall of the Ten Pylorics.

The Lord of the Purple Yun Realm announced the rebuilding of the Tianyun Sect and summoned the former Tianyun Sect's extra-dimensional realm to return, and suddenly many hidden Tianyun Sect's extra-dimensional realms appeared, and they returned to the Tianyun Sect one after another, although the number is not large, but at least it can help the Tianyun Sect complete the most basic formation work.

As for Ye Tian, holding an honorary elder position in the Tianyun Sect would not be involved in anything in the Tianyun Sect.

After the matter of the Ten Pyloric Gates, Ye Tian's reputation spread.

They all knew that Ye Tian was able to kill the Lord of the Cover Realm, and he was undoubtedly the top Ninth Realm combat power.

For a while, every Ninth Realm was afraid of Ye Tian.

But after that, Ye Tian kept a low profile and stayed in the Terran Race to silently retreat and do penance.

And the Terran also obtained the foundation of the Ten Pyloric Gates this time, and most of them were taken away by Ye Tian and given to the Terrans.

Therefore, the human race relied on the foundation of the Ten Pyloric Sects to grow extremely rapidly, and gradually began to have the birth of the seventh realm.

this day.

Under Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation, Ye Xingchen finally created the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Technique, and then successfully broke the bottleneck of the chain of dimensional rules, and began to continue to comprehend the dimensional rules.

With the resources and heritage that the human race now has, it won't take too long for Ye Xingchen to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, so that he can be perfectly promoted to the seventh realm.

......

"This pearl of the ruins is really extraordinary!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He has been using the Pearl of Returning Ruins to comprehend the Supreme Dimensional Rules all these years, and its effect is really good, better than that of the Primal Star.

The primordial star can assist in the comprehension of the supreme dimensional rules, which is its collateral effect, and the pearl of the ruins can really assist in the comprehension of the supreme dimensional rules.

In addition, his multi-dimensional wisdom light and several secret techniques of the Supreme Dimensional Domain that help to improve his comprehension, as well as some dimensional star weapons that he has collected to help him comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dimension.

These dimensional astral artifacts also had side effects, but he didn't care.

Under the superposition of these things, the efficiency of his comprehension of the rules of the highest dimension is extremely extraordinary.
